---
title: "test_mimir_batch_1_2.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_mimir_batch_1_2.py"
loc: 72
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 4.85
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_batch_1_2.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on project_root, test_muninn_refactor_calls, test_code_sanitizer_imports, test_norn_task_parsing, test_dialogue_engine_scoring, test_scenario_generation_parity, test_install_skill_interface. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via project_root, test_muninn_refactor_calls, test_code_sanitizer_imports, test_norn_task_parsing, test_dialogue_engine_scoring, test_scenario_generation_parity, test_install_skill_interface. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.skills.install_skill](file://src.skills.install_skill)

### Exports
- `project_root`
- `test_muninn_refactor_calls`
- `test_code_sanitizer_imports`
- `test_norn_task_parsing`
- `test_dialogue_engine_scoring`
- `test_scenario_generation_parity`
- `test_install_skill_interface`
